nodes.label: Cardholder
nodes.notes: Card presented at the point of interaction. PAN encrypted immediately at swipe/dip/tap.

nodes.label: P2PE Terminal
nodes.notes: PCI-listed P2PE hardware. Encrypts PAN at point of interaction using DUKPT key. Merchant cannot access plaintext PAN.

nodes.label: Merchant POS System
nodes.notes: OUT OF SCOPE: Merchant systems never see plaintext PAN. P2PE removes them from CDE.

nodes.label: Firewall
nodes.notes: Req 1: Only encrypted payloads traverse this boundary. Merchant LAN never touches PAN.

nodes.label: P2PE Decryption Hub
nodes.notes: Operated by the P2PE Solution Provider (P2PE-SP). Decrypts using HSM inside secure facility.

nodes.label: HSM (Decryption)
nodes.notes: Req 3.7: DUKPT key derivation and PAN decryption. FIPS 140-2 L3. Operated by P2PE-SP.

nodes.label: Card Network
nodes.notes: External — receives auth request after decryption by P2PE-SP.

nodes.label: Acquiring Bank
nodes.notes: External — settlement. P2PE-SP transmits settled funds to acquirer.

nodes.label: Audit Log Server
nodes.notes: Req 10: P2PE-SP maintains logs of all decryption events. Merchant retains transaction logs only.
